apsNote: Small institution — limited spaces per programme. Apply early.
requiredDocuments: Certified copy of South African ID or valid passport
Certified copy of matric certificate or statement of results
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)

internationalStudents.note: International applicants require SAQA evaluation of qualifications.

applicationFee.note: CORRECTION from R100; CAO R250 on-time

faculties.note: CORRECTION: Natural Sciences->Applied and Health Sciences

internationalFee: R300 (on-time via CAO); R580 late (from 1 November)
apsSystem: APS based on best 5 subjects (NSC rating scale: 90-100%=8pts down to 40-49%=3pts); minimum varies by faculty/programme

flags: 2027-specific APS minimums not yet published for most Engineering and Applied/Health Sciences programmes — values sourced from current/recent prospectuses which may differ for 2027 intake
CAO fee amounts (R250/R300/R470/R580) confirmed for 2026 entry structure; 2027 fee amounts assumed same but not yet officially confirmed for 2027 entry on CAO website

Engineering programme-specific APS totals not published on official MUT pages — only subject-level requirements (Math 4, Phys Sci 4, English 4) given; APS of 20 for Civil/Surveying sourced from department page
